title: The Frankincense.
content:
When my off'ring next I make,
    Be thy hand the hallowed cake,
    And thy breast the altar whence
    Love may smell the frankincense.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Frankincense."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
